sections.paragraph:
only found in const. אֶרֶךְ adj.-

(1) long; Eze 17:3, אֶרֶךְ הָאֵבֶר “(an eagle) with long feathers, long-feathered.”

(2) slow, in the phrases אֶרֶךְ רוּחַ Ecc 7:8, and אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם “slow to anger,” μακρόθυμος, Pro 15:18 16:32 Exo 34:6 Num 14:18 comp. Syriac ܢܰܓܺܝܪܳܐ ܕܪܘܽܚܳܐ patient, Arab. ذو طول long, i.e. long-suffering. Once אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם is τὸ μακρόθυμον, patience, long-suffering, Jer 15:15. Opposed to קְצַר רוּחַ.
